raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/XXXX To : Citibank XX/XX/XXXX Cc : XXXX XXXX : Best Buy I am in receipt of your letter on behalf of Best Buy claiming I owe {$210.00}. I am refuting for the THIRD time this bill as it is not valid. I began my dispute in XX/XX/XXXX. Followed by written letters disputing the charges beginning in XXXX ( see letter attached dated XX/XX/XXXX ). After several direct phone calls with both Best Buy, who not until I made 4 separate extremely frustration phone calls did I finally get a representative to provide me with a suggestion to contact Citi Card. 
XX/XX/XXXX -Call Best Buy with no results XXXX XXXX Called again Best Buy -my call transferred to a voicemail that did not address my dispute no help XXXX XXXX Called again Best Buy -no help given again transferred me to same voice mail messaging service with no response XXXX XXXX Sent Letter ( attached ) no response to my letter XX/XX/XXXX Called Best Buy and finally got a representative to speak to me. Her name is XXXX. She could not substantiate the charge. She suggested I speak with Citi Card as she could not do anything. She was going to transfer me or give me a number to call. I insisted she stay on the line with me as I did not trust transferring my call would be successful. She obliged. 
XX/XX/XXXX I asked both to substantiate what the charge was for and neither could provide that information. I explained that I never authorized any continual service contract for a laptop that I purchased 3 years ago and that was the only thing I could think of that would be the cause for the bill. With both representatives on the phone the Citibank representative CONFIRMED for me that she would cancel whatever it was and I would not be charged and she said clearly we will correct this for you and apologized. I asked for a confirmation # or some form of validation that this would be done she provided this number # XXXX. As I have lost confidence in your system I am reporting all to the following agencies requesting inquiries be made on my behalf : Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, Federal Trade Commission XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Police Department XXXX
